creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Fingers were too fast ...

The error shown popped up today after a recent upgrade of the CURRENT host running FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #28 r356483: Wed Jan  8 09:29:49 UTC 2020  amd64. The ports tree has been updated recently, the migration from python 3.6 to 3.7 has been performed recently, too.

Tried to recompile lang/python|lang/python3|lang/python37 via "portmaster -dRf" to ensure I've on the most recent track for the python 3.7 suite. but it didn't help.
